mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charging_queue (queue_id, pile_id, queue_len_m, current_length) VALUES (#{queueId}, #{pileId}, #{queueLenM}, #{currentLength})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charging_queue ORDER BY pile_id
SELECT cq.* FROM charging_queue cq JOIN charging_pile cp ON cp.pile_id = cq.pile_id WHERE cp.pile_type = #{queueType} ORDER BY cq.pile_id
SELECT * FROM tariff_policy WHERE status = '已配置' ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1
